import json, re, unicodedata

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

quran = load_json('/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json')
hadith = load_json('/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json')

def normalize(ar):
    # remove tashkeel, tatweel, punctuation; normalize hamza forms
    if ar is None:
        return ''
    # Remove diacritics
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    ar = diacritics.sub('', ar)
    # Tatweel
    ar = ar.replace('ـ', '')
    # Normalize different alef/hamza forms
    ar = re.sub('[إأٱآا]', 'ا', ar)
    ar = ar.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ة', 'ه')
    # punctuation and non-letters
    ar = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9\s]', ' ', ar)
    # collapse spaces
    ar = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', ar).strip()
    return ar

snippet = "وَلَوْلاَ أَنَّ اللَهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَمَرَ بِالنِسَاءِ لَمَسَحْنَ بِالأَذى"
norm_snippet = normalize(snippet)
norm_snippet

# Search hadith texts for high-overlap candidates
def search_hadith(norm_query, topn=20):
    results = []
    for rec in hadith:
        text = rec.get('hadithTxt') or rec.get('Matn') or ''
        norm = normalize(text)
        if not norm:
            continue
        if all(tok in norm for tok in norm_query.split()[:3]):  # basic presence
            # compute simple similarity as overlap of tokens
            q_tokens = set(norm_query.split())
            t_tokens = set(norm.split())
            overlap = len(q_tokens & t_tokens) / max(1,len(q_tokens))
            if 'النساء' in norm or 'النس' in norm:
                overlap += 0.05
            results.append((overlap, text, rec))
        else:
            # try substring of some key phrase
            if 'امر بالنساء' in norm and 'بالاذى' in norm:
                results.append((0.6, text, rec))
    results.sort(reverse=True, key=lambda x: x[0])
    return results[:topn]

cands = search_hadith(norm_snippet, topn=50)
len(cands), [r[0] for r in cands[:10]]
